title: Croatian Turkey Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry featuring Croatian sausage and turkey, served with fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Croatian sausage and cook for 3-4 minutes, until browned.
Add the sliced turkey breast and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the savory stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, and sesame seeds (if using).
Pour the sauce over the turkey and sausage, and stir to coat.
Add the chopped scallions and cooked rice to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is well coated with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with additional scallions and sesame seeds if desired.
